# PineMarket

> Marketplace for premium TradingView Pine Script indicators, strategies, screeners, and educational content. Traders buy scripts from verified creators; creators publish and sell with instant TradingView delivery.

PineMarket connects Pine Script authors with traders. Purchases grant instant access through TradingView, and sellers can bundle scripts into programs and packages. Payments are handled through Stripe Connect.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the marketplace and featured Pine Script programs and creators.
- [Browse Scripts](/browse): Search and filter published Pine Script indicators, strategies, screeners, utilities, libraries, and educational content.
- [Creators](/creators): Directory of featured Pine Script creators on PineMarket.
- [Contact Support](/support/new): Submit a support ticket to the PineMarket team.

## Optional

- [Sign In / Sign Up](/auth): Account creation and login for buyers and sellers.
